Projects

Research systems, illustration work, and tools I've built.

allresearchillustrationsoftware

AccessDraw

Research

A browser-based illustration tool designed for users with motor disabilities, featuring adaptive brush controls and customizable input mappings.

2024
AccessibilityCanvas APIReactUser Study
Code Visit

Embodied Prototyping Toolkit

Research

A set of physical prototyping materials and templates designed to help HCI researchers externalize interaction ideas through bodystorming.

2023
PrototypingBodystormingDesign Research
Visit

Between the Lines

Illustration

An ongoing illustration series exploring the space between technical diagrams and expressive drawing. Ink on paper, digitally composited.

2023
IllustrationInkSeries
Visit

Interaction Zine Vol. 1

Illustration

A self-published zine combining hand-drawn illustrations with short essays on computing, touch, and the physicality of screens.

2022
ZineIllustrationWriting

Annotation Studio

Software

A lightweight research tool for qualitative coding of video data with synchronized transcript views. Used in two published studies.

2022
PythonResearch ToolVideo Analysis
